---
title: "statlm_logo"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(hexSticker)
library(ggplot2)
library(showtext)

font_add_google("Montserrat", "montserrat")
showtext_auto()

# ── Colores ─────────────────────────────────────────
azul_marino <- "#1A5276"
rojo_una    <- "#A93226"
naranja     <- "#FC7D0B"
blanco      <- "#FFFFFF"

# ── Coordenadas del árbol ──────────────────────────
nodes <- data.frame(
  x = c(0, -0.05, 0.05, -0.08, -0.02, 0.02, 0.08),
  y = c(0.10, 0.07, 0.07, 0.04, 0.04, 0.04, 0.04),
  grupo = c(
    "root", "internal", "internal",
    "leaf1", "leaf2", "leaf3", "leaf4"
  )
)

edges <- data.frame(
  x    = c(0, 0, -0.05, -0.05, 0.05, 0.05),
  y    = c(0.10, 0.10, 0.07, 0.07, 0.07, 0.07),
  xend = c(-0.05, 0.05, -0.08, -0.02, 0.02, 0.08),
  yend = c(0.07, 0.07, 0.04, 0.04, 0.04, 0.04)
)

# ── Árbol minimalista ──────────────────────────────
p_tree <- ggplot() +

  # ramas
  geom_segment(
    data = edges,
    aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend),
    linewidth = 0.25,
    color = azul_marino
  ) +

  # nodos
  geom_point(
    data = nodes,
    aes(x = x, y = y, fill = grupo),
    shape = 21,
    size = 1.5,
    color = azul_marino,
    stroke = 0.3
  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "root"     = naranja,
      "internal" = blanco,
      "leaf1"    = azul_marino,
      "leaf2"    = naranja,
      "leaf3"    = azul_marino,
      "leaf4"    = naranja
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +

  coord_equal() +

  theme_void() +

  theme(
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = blanco, color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = blanco, color = NA)
  )

# ── Hexsticker ─────────────────────────────────────
sticker(
  subplot    = p_tree,

  package    = "StatLM",
  p_family   = "montserrat",
  p_fontface = "bold",
  p_color    = azul_marino,
  p_size     = 20,
  p_y        = 1.45,

  s_x        = 1,
  s_y        = 0.95,
  s_width    = 1.4,
  s_height   = 1.8,

  h_fill     = blanco,
  h_color    = rojo_una,
  h_size     = 1.5,

  filename   = "hexsticker_StatLM.png",
  dpi        = 300
)
```
